scenario_metadata.title: Operation Rising Tide
scenario_metadata.description: Joint All-Domain evacuation and management mission.

inject_triggers.title: Typhoon Francisco Update
inject_triggers.content: Previous weather models underestimated speed. Forecast landfall Okinawa NET 2200Z Oct 14. Accelerate all plans immediately.

inject_triggers.title: Airliner Ditch - Search and Rescue
inject_triggers.content: Regional airliner (100 souls) ditched 75nm SE of Yokota. JASDF assets unavailable. Deploy asset for observation and supply airdrop.
